What We Covered In This Module:
✓ Why Tracking Is MANDATORY!
✓ Getting Started With Hypertracker!
✓ How To Set-Up A Tracking Campaign!
✓ How To Track Opt-Ins!
✓ How To Track Sales!
✓ How To Track Your Transaction Maximization Offers!
✓ What The Different Tracking Metrics Mean
Module 9

-- 1 of 2 --

What To Do Now:
1. 	Create A Hypertracker Account!
2. 	Add The Action Integration Code On Your Customer
Captivation Offer Page (to Track Opt-ins)!
3. 	Add The Appropriate Sales Integration Code On Each Of Your
Transaction Maximization Pages (to Track Sales)!
• 	Be sure to remove “&sales=1” from the Sales Integration Code 	(as
demonstrated in Lesson 2) so the Total Sales number remains accurate.
Module 9

-- 2 of 2 --
